# Precision Structures — Page Review PDFs

**Status:** Pending generation
**Generated by:** `node scripts/generate-review-pdfs.js`

## Instructions

1. Run the PDF generation script (see `/scripts/generate-review-pdfs.js`)
2. PDFs will be generated here for all 6 website pages
3. Send to client for markup and review
4. Implement requested changes on staging branch

## Expected Output

| Page | Desktop PDF | Mobile PDF |
|------|-------------|------------|
| Home | home-page.pdf | home-page-mobile.pdf |
| About Us | about-page.pdf | about-page-mobile.pdf |
| Services | services-page.pdf | services-page-mobile.pdf |
| Gallery | gallery-page.pdf | gallery-page-mobile.pdf |
| Resources | resources-page.pdf | resources-page-mobile.pdf |
| Contact | contact-page.pdf | contact-page-mobile.pdf |

## How to Generate

```bash
# Install dependencies (one-time)
npm install playwright
npx playwright install chromium

# Start local server in one terminal
npx serve . -l 3000

# Generate PDFs in another terminal
node scripts/generate-review-pdfs.js

# For mobile views too:
node scripts/generate-review-pdfs.js --mobile

# Or use the staging URL:
node scripts/generate-review-pdfs.js --url https://your-staging.azurestaticapps.net
```
